raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill (SB) 483 will prohibit school personnel from using physical restraint methods on students that involve holding children in a facedown position.",
    "Research has found that prone restraints are disproportionately applied to students with special needs and children of color.",
    "California schools reported 6,785 incidents of physical restraints in the 2022-2023 school year alone.",
    "The use of prone restraint has persisted despite recommendations from the U.S. Department of Education to eliminate it.",
    "California will join over thirty states that have already banned prone restraints in schools when SB 483 becomes law."
  ]
}
```
